name: James Beards Mothers Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cherries, apricots, pineapple, peel, raisins, sultanas, and currants in a bowl.
2. Marinate with brandy for 2 days, stirring occasionally.
3. Add nuts and 1/4 cup of flour; stir well.
4. Cream butter with the two sugars, adding eggs one at a time until well mixed.
5. Add chocolate and brandy to the batter.
6. Sift together flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and baking powder into the mixture.
7. Add the fruit mix and blend thoroughly.
8. Pour into a tin, hollowing the center.
9. Bake at 150°C for 2 1/2 to 3 hours.
10. Paint with brandy and store for at least two months to mature.
